          <DT><H3 ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1766594175">Toolbox</H3>
          <DL><p>
              <DT><A HREF="https://www.ncorr.com/" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://www.ncorr.com/" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Ncorr - Open source 2D digital image correlation MATLAB software</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://damask-multiphysics.org/documentation/index.html" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://damask-multiphysics.org/documentation/index.html" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">DAMASK</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://damask-multiphysics.org/documentation/file_formats/materialpoint/phase/phenopowerlaw.html" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://damask-multiphysics.org/documentation/file_formats/materialpoint/phase/phenopowerlaw.html" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Phenopowerlaw — DAMASK</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://mtex-toolbox.github.io/index" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="https://mtex-toolbox.github.io/images/favicons/favicon.png" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">MTEX</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://mtex-toolbox.github.io/EBSDReferenceFrame.html" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="https://mtex-toolbox.github.io/images/favicons/favicon.png" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Reference Frame Alignment | MTEX</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://mtex-toolbox.github.io/MisorientationTheory.html" ADD_DATE="1763193600" LAST_MODIFIED="1763193602" ICON_URI="https://mtex-toolbox.github.io/images/favicons/favicon.png" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Theory of Misorientations | MTEX</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://groups.google.com/g/mtexmail" ADD_DATE="1757743045" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/product/1x/groups_32dp.png" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">MTEX - Google Groups</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://github.com/mtex-toolbox/mtex/discussions" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="https://github.githubassets.com/favicons/favicon.svg" ICON="data:image/svg+xml;base64,">mtex-toolbox/mtex · Discussions · GitHub</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://stabix.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html#" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://stabix.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html#" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Slip Transmission Matlab toolbox — Slip transfer analysis toolbox 2.0.0 documentation</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://scikit-learn.org/stable/" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://scikit-learn.org/stable/" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">scikit-learn: machine learning in Python — scikit-learn 1.6.1 documentation</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://www.crystallography.net/cod/" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://www.crystallography.net/cod/" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Crystallography Open Database</A>

              <DT><A HREF="https://docs.lammps.org/Manual.html" ADD_DATE="1766402148" LAST_MODIFIED="1766402152" ICON_URI="https://docs.lammps.org/_static/lammps.ico" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">LAMMPS Documentation (10 Dec 2025 version) — LAMMPS documentation</A>

          <DT><A HREF="https://gemini.google.com/app?pli=1" ADD_DATE="1766283508" LAST_MODIFIED="1767686769" ICON_URI="https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/gemini_sparkle_aurora_33f86dc0c0257da337c63.svg" ICON="data:image/svg+xml;base64,">Google Gemini</A>

          <DT><A HREF="https://hexo.io/zh-cn/" ADD_DATE="1765636574" LAST_MODIFIED="1768149237" ICON_URI="https://hexo.io/icon/favicon-32x32.png" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Hexo</A>
          <DT><A HREF="https://notebooklm.google.com/" ADD_DATE="1766379870" LAST_MODIFIED="1766379870" ICON_URI="https://notebooklm.google.com/_/static/branding/v5/dark_mode/favicon/favicon.svg" ICON="data:image/svg+xml;base64,">NotebookLM</A>
          <DT><H3 ADD_DATE="1766551302" LAST_MODIFIED="1767513584">晶体塑性耦合相场模拟</H3>
          <DL><p>
              <DT><A HREF="https://cn.comsol.com/models/page/2?q=%22crack%22&sort=popularity" ADD_DATE="1766551289" LAST_MODIFIED="1766551304" ICON_URI="https://cn.comsol.com/images/favicon.ico" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">超过 1000 个 COMSOL Multiphysics® 建模示例供您下载</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FpsTvOGRBow" ADD_DATE="1766549831" LAST_MODIFIED="1766551306" ICON_URI="https://www.youtube.com/s/desktop/a3c20ab4/img/favicon_32x32.png" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Phase field modelling of pitting and stress corrosion cracking (COMPLAS 2021 talk, Martínez-Pañeda) - YouTube</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://github.com/idaholab/moose/discussions/29023" ADD_DATE="1766557119" LAST_MODIFIED="1766557119" ICON_URI="https://github.githubassets.com/favicons/favicon.svg" ICON="data:image/svg+xml;base64,">how to calibrate phase field parameters when coupling with crystal plasticity · idaholab/moose · Discussion #29023</A>
          </DL><p>
      </DL><p>
      <DT><H3 ADD_DATE="1757218075" LAST_MODIFIED="1766483370" UNFILED_BOOKMARKS_FOLDER="true">其他书签</H3>
      <DL><p>
          <DT><H3 ADD_DATE="1757752320" LAST_MODIFIED="1765969735">阅读</H3>
          <DL><p>
              <DT><A HREF="https://colab.research.google.com/github/jwangjie/Gaussian-Processes-Regression-Tutorial/blob/master/gpr_tutorial.ipynb#scrollTo=Vrn3zxVv9v81" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://colab.research.google.com/github/jwangjie/Gaussian-Processes-Regression-Tutorial/blob/master/gpr_tutorial.ipynb#scrollTo=Vrn3zxVv9v81" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">gpr_tutorial.ipynb - Colab</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/75589452" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/75589452" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">(89 封私信 / 80 条消息) 高斯过程 Gaussian Processes 原理、可视化及代码实现 - 知乎</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://reliability.readthedocs.io/en/latest/Fitting%20a%20specific%20distribution%20to%20data.html#example-1" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://reliability.readthedocs.io/en/latest/Fitting%20a%20specific%20distribution%20to%20data.html#example-1" ICON="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAACAAAAAgCAIAAAD8GO2jAAAAbklEQVRIiWN0C4xgoCVgoqnp9LCABc5yCwjHo27XhpUQxpxpk4kxNyUrF8IYTkEEB/DQwBNu8BCAA1xBN/SDaCDiAH96hQAiE+twDaLRZEpnC0aTKUGAJYiIAaPJlIqAzDgYScl06FvAONr4JQQACvQeVOMrPTsAAAAASUVORK5CYII=">Fitting a specific distribution to data — reliability 0.9.0 documentation</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://www.zhihu.com/question/527570173" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://www.zhihu.com/question/527570173" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">(89 封私信 / 80 条消息) 何时使用shap value分析特征重要性？ - 知乎</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/657361902" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/657361902" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">(89 封私信 / 80 条消息) 合作博弈与Shapley Value - 知乎</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://www.51cto.com/article/795611.html" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://www.51cto.com/article/795611.html" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">解释模型还只看特征重要性？那你就 OUT 咯！-51CTO.COM</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://jerkwin.github.io/2014/04/17/%E6%9D%90%E6%96%99%E5%BC%B9%E6%80%A7%E6%A8%A1%E9%87%8F%E5%90%84%E5%90%91%E5%BC%82%E6%80%A7%E7%9A%84%E4%B8%89%E7%BB%B4%E5%9B%BE%E7%A4%BA%E6%96%B9%E6%B3%95/" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://jerkwin.github.io/2014/04/17/%E6%9D%90%E6%96%99%E5%BC%B9%E6%80%A7%E6%A8%A1%E9%87%8F%E5%90%84%E5%90%91%E5%BC%82%E6%80%A7%E7%9A%84%E4%B8%89%E7%BB%B4%E5%9B%BE%E7%A4%BA%E6%96%B9%E6%B3%95/" ICON="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABAAAAAQCAYAAAAf8/9hAAAAWElEQVQ4jWP8z8Dwn4EEwMjAwIjMZyJFMzZAsQGMyF748fMXSZo52dkYB94LLLgkONjZsIqje5N2LkC2CZdrqO8CfDbRzAWUewE5c3z/+YukjEUVF1BsAABvHBEnEAAtrgAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==">材料弹性模量各向异性的三维图示方法|Jerkwin</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://gaussianprocess.org/" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://gaussianprocess.org/" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Welcome to the Gaussian Process pages | the Gaussian Process web site</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://www.163.com/dy/article/HV9TNPDE051186GP.html" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://www.163.com/dy/article/HV9TNPDE051186GP.html" ICON="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAACAAAAAgCAYAAABzenr0AAAAnklEQVRYhe2XwQ6AMAhD0fj/v4wnL2iFEg0QfceBbFTSqcjXWaKJKqJk4VDtlSn6Bu4pUee2w2iepa8CXkc2jtZt3FKuwJZ9MDrlHnMVYH0BMU+Bo3M0A6wy5QqknZDYYKgTWljnu9iopxOeTpW9/bK3Y7kCNCqid+8dxdF6uQLQCZ+aBY9+CkQ7yuZZyhV4zAmzs9FXAfbrdux/wc8OgJg+KYkftxkAAAAASUVORK5CYII=">3D打印在核电领域的应用发展|3d打印|核反应堆_网易订阅</A>

          <DT><H3 ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1765969732">专利-Ni-Cr合金</H3>
          <DL><p>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/?q=(ni-cr+nickel+chromium+corrosion+alloy+nuclear+cladding+composition)&oq=ni-cr+nickel+chromium+corrosion+alloy+nuclear+cladding+composition&sort=new&page=2" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://patents.google.com/?q=(ni-cr+nickel+chromium+corrosion+alloy+nuclear+cladding+composition)&oq=ni-cr+nickel+chromium+corrosion+alloy+nuclear+cladding+composition&sort=new&page=2" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">ni-cr 镍铬腐蚀合金核包层组合物 - Google Patents --- ni-cr nickel chromium corrosion alloy nuclear cladding composition - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/CN119287220A/en?q=(ni-cr+nickel+chromium+corrosion+alloy+nuclear+cladding+composition)&oq=ni-cr+nickel+chromium+corrosion+alloy+nuclear+cladding+composition&sort=new&page=1" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://patents.google.com/patent/CN119287220A/en?q=(ni-cr+nickel+chromium+corrosion+alloy+nuclear+cladding+composition)&oq=ni-cr+nickel+chromium+corrosion+alloy+nuclear+cladding+composition&sort=new&page=1" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">CN119287220A - 一种模块化反应堆包壳用抗辐射镍铬合金及其制备方法 - Google Patents --- CN119287220A - Radiation-resistant nickel-chromium alloy for modular reactor cladding and preparation method thereof - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new&page=1" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://patents.google.com/?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new&page=1" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">(C22C19/052) (腐蚀) (核) - Google Patents --- (C22C19/052) (corrosion) (nuclear) - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/WO2024045939A1/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new&peid=638fe26be4f98%3A29%3A6196707c" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://patents.google.com/patent/WO2024045939A1/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new&peid=638fe26be4f98%3A29%3A6196707c" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">WO2024045939A1 - 一种核屏蔽用富镝镍钨合金材料及其制备方法 - Google Patents --- WO2024045939A1 - Dysprosium-rich nickel-tungsten alloy material for nuclear shielding and preparation method therefor - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/DE10392186T5/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://patents.google.com/patent/DE10392186T5/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">DE10392186T5 - 对含有无机酸的超临界水环境具有优异耐腐蚀性的镍基合金 - Google Patents --- DE10392186T5 - Nickel-based alloy with outstanding corrosion resistance to supercritical water environments containing inorganic acids - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/WO1997018340A1/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://patents.google.com/patent/WO1997018340A1/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">WO1997018340A1 - 镍基合金(变体) - Google Patents --- WO1997018340A1 - Nickel-based alloy (variants) - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/DE3000913A1/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://patents.google.com/patent/DE3000913A1/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">DE3000913A1 - 镍基硬质合金 - Google Patents --- DE3000913A1 - NICKEL-BASED HARD ALLOY - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/GB1588464A/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new&page=1" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://patents.google.com/patent/GB1588464A/en?q=(C22C19%2f052)+(corrosion)+(nuclear)&sort=new&page=1" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">GB1588464A - 镍基合金 - Google Patents --- GB1588464A - Nickel-base alloy - Google Patents</A>

              <DT><A HREF="https://www.koreascience.kr/article/JAKO202017561782261.page?&lang=ko" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://www.koreascience.kr/article/JAKO202017561782261.page?&lang=ko" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">《适用于(500-1100)℃温度范围内中子辐照 42XNM 管环拉伸试验延展性的改进评估》-核工程与技术 | 韩国科学 --- Improved evaluation of ring tensile test ductility applied to neutron irradiated 42XNM tubes in the temperature range of (500-1100)℃ -Nuclear Engineering and Technology | Korea Science</A>

          </DL><p>
          <DT><H3 ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1765969730">专利-氧化膜脱膜</H3>
          <DL><p>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/CN1103114A/zh" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="https://patents.google.com/favicon.ico" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">CN1103114A - 从金属表面上去除某些氧化膜的方法 - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/CN104342714B/zh" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="https://patents.google.com/favicon.ico" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">CN104342714B - 一种去除不锈钢表面氧化皮的方法 - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://muchong.com/html/201711/4460177.html" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://muchong.com/html/201711/4460177.html" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">铝合金表面氧化膜去除方法？ - 金属 - 小木虫 - 学术 科研 互动社区</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://patents.google.com/patent/US4573968A/en" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="https://patents.google.com/favicon.ico" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">US4573968A - Infusion and blood chemistry monitoring system - Google Patents</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://muchong.com/t-3680674-1" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://muchong.com/t-3680674-1" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">如何去除核电管道材料的高温水腐蚀氧化膜，三氧化二铁 三氧化二铝 三氧化二铬等 - 金属 - 腐蚀防护 - 小木虫论坛-学术科研互动平台</A>
              <DT><A HREF="https://muchong.com/bbs/search.php?wd=%D1%F5%BB%AF%C4%A4%C8%A5%B3%FD&fid=0&search_type=&adfilter=0&order=2" ADD_DATE="1757218223" LAST_MODIFIED="1758525248" ICON_URI="fake-favicon-uri:https://muchong.com/bbs/search.php?wd=%D1%F5%BB%AF%C4%A4%C8%A5%B3%FD&fid=0&search_type=&adfilter=0&order=2" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">小木虫论坛-学术科研互动平台</A>
